candidates.title: Aesopica (Chambry Edition)
candidates.quality_notes: Standard scholarly edition, numbered fables, clean Greek text
candidates.confidence_notes: Perseus catalog confirms Chambry edition availability. May need to verify exact numbering for Fable 150.
candidates.ranking_rationale: Most authoritative modern edition with stable numbering, Perseus provides good structure for extraction

candidates.title: Aesopi Fabulae (Chambry) - Internet Archive
candidates.confidence_notes: Archive.org has multiple Chambry editions. Text quality dependent on scan quality.
candidates.ranking_rationale: Backup if Perseus unavailable, but requires more extraction work

candidates.title: Aesop's Fables (Greek) - Wikisource
candidates.quality_notes: Community maintained, variable quality, numbering may differ
candidates.confidence_notes: Greek Wikisource has Aesop texts but numbering system uncertain
candidates.ranking_rationale: Less authoritative but potentially useful for verification
